scope: Medical equipment bucket data normalization plus Treat Injury skill-use integration

treatInjuryUses.name: Revivify (trained, medkit, within 1 round of death)
Long-Term Care (8 hours per day max)

implementation.resolver: scripts/engine/equipment/equipment-skill-hook-resolver.js now resolves required gear, equipment bonuses, and on-attempt consumables for skill uses.
implementation.sheet: scripts/sheets/v2/character-sheet.js now annotates extra skill uses with equipment state and blocks missing required gear.
implementation.consumption: Medpac/FastFlesh/critical-care consumables decrement quantity after the roll dialog is accepted and before the roll executes.
implementation.templates: skills panel partials display equipment bonus/consumption tags.

sourceBasis: SWSE Fandom Medical Gear table: costs/weights and medical gear category
SWSE Fandom Treat Injury applications and required items
SWSE Fandom Medpac/FastFlesh rules for consumption and bonuses
SWSE Fandom Medical Kit/Surgery Kit/Bacta Tank/Bioscanner/Medisensor item pages
